title: Silence From The Grave destroys all magic cards on field

card.rawText: Discard 1 magic card to the cemetery to play this card. Destroy all magic cards on the field. For 2 turn cycles, your opponent cannot play magic cards and their creature effects are negated during your turn. The opponent may still respond with a valid Lightning card before this card resolves.

plan.title: Silence From The Grave destroys all magic cards on field
plan.summary: Pay Silence From The Grave's discard cost, allow the opponent response window, then verify every existing field Magic card is destroyed as Silence resolves.

notes: Keep Health Potion in hand for Silence's cost.
Pre-place test_magic_spd_plus4 and Hero Shield on field magic slots before Silence resolves.

steps: Player 1 plays Silence From The Grave.
Discard Health Potion for the pre-chain cost.
Resolve Silence and inspect all magic slots and cemeteries.
manualVerification: Confirm only field Magic is wiped by this branch; the pre-chain discard remains a separate cost.
riskNotes: Silence also applies lock/suppression after the destroy branch; those are covered by separate fixtures.

runnerNotes: Create a dev match from plan.setup, execute plan.steps, then verify plan.expectedAssertions.
The deterministic engine and manual QA status remain source of truth.
